summary: Phase 1 AI Intelligence (Session Memory + Natural Language Cart Actions) - All features verified working. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows tested successfully.
passed_tests: Chat endpoint accessible and returns response
Product recommendations returned with session memory data
'add them all' adds all products from session memory
'add the first one' adds only the first product
'add the last one' adds only the last product
Empty session memory returns appropriate error message
AI responses have no markdown formatting
Cart action responses are SHORT (under 100 chars)
Toast notifications appear for cart actions
Cart count updates correctly in header
Session memory tracks products recommended during conversation
critical_code_review_comments: Direct cart action detection in backend (lines 2548-2623) handles commands without LLM call - efficient implementation
Session memory is properly passed from frontend to backend via session_memory field in ChatMessageInput
Cart patterns support both English and Spanish commands (add_all, add_first, add_last, clear)
Response messages are appropriately short: 'Listo. Añadí X productos a tu carrito.'
Frontend AIAssistant.js properly builds session memory from recommended products (lines 310-318)
Cart is refreshed via fetchCart() after successful cart action (line 324)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 AI Intelligence fully tested and working. Key implementation: 1) Direct cart action detection in backend server.py (lines 2548-2623) handles 'add them all', 'add the first one', 'add the last one', 'clear my cart' and Spanish equivalents WITHOUT calling LLM. 2) Session memory is stored in frontend state and sent with each message. 3) /api/ai/execute-action endpoint handles actual cart operations. 4) Responses are SHORT like 'Listo. Añadí X productos.' 5) Toast notifications appear via toast.success() after cart actions.

session_memory.details: Products recommended during conversation are tracked in sessionMemory state and sent to backend

add_them_all.details: English 'add them all' and Spanish 'añade todo' both add all session memory products to cart

add_first_one.details: 'add the first one' correctly adds only the first product from session memory

add_last_one.details: 'add the last one' correctly adds only the last product from session memory

clear_cart.details: English 'clear my cart' and Spanish 'vaciar carrito' both clear the cart

short_responses.details: All cart action responses are under 100 chars, e.g., 'Listo. Añadí 5 productos a tu carrito.'

toast_notifications.details: Toast notifications appear for all cart actions confirming success

no_markdown.details: AI responses are clean text without markdown formatting (**, ##, ```, etc.)
